entries.title: No Yuuzhan Vong Before Vector Prime

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.
continuity.notes: Development deck. Keep separate from Disney canon and later post-NJO Legends unless a later deck is active.

content.fact: Before Vector Prime/NJO context, the Yuuzhan Vong invasion should not be active public galactic knowledge.
content.injection: Do not leak Yuuzhan Vong invasion facts into New Republic or Rebellion contexts unless the user explicitly loads a time-travel or pre-invasion scout premise.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Vector Prime / Invasion Begins.
Respect story-position bounds from Vector Prime / Invasion Begins to Vector Prime / Invasion Begins.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.
content.notes: Generated development Lorecard pending human review.

content.fact: Chewbacca’s death should not be known or assumed before Sernpidal.
content.injection: Before Sernpidal, keep Chewbacca alive in standard Legends continuity; after Sernpidal, preserve the death. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Sernpidal Disaster.
Respect story-position bounds from Sernpidal Disaster to Sernpidal Disaster.

entries.title: No Disney New Jedi Order Confusion

content.fact: The Legends New Jedi Order is not the Disney-canon post-sequel New Jedi Order concept.

content.fact: The Yuuzhan Vong War is not resolved before The Unifying Force endgame.

constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: The Unifying Force endgame.
